use_cases: Interactive hotel booking cards with call-to-action buttons for reservations
Accommodation listing components with action triggers for user engagement
Property showcase interfaces requiring clear selection or booking CTAs
ai_summary: A reusable button component with Radix UI integration and class-variance-authority for consistent styling across variants and sizes. Features accessibility-focused focus rings, keyboard navigation support, and multiple visual variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Designed as part of a hotel card UI system for accommodation booking interfaces.
